message:
Fix Excalidraw script for Node.js 20 compatibility

Replace fs.glob (Node.js 22+) with recursive fs.readdir for finding
.excalidraw files, ensuring compatibility with Node.js 20 used in CI.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
